sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2377" key="ai)ki/stria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰκ-ίστρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen> (as if from a masc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἰκιστής</foreign>), <sense id="n2377.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she who tortures</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
